title: chore(image): remove legacy vendored backends and stale artifacts
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes `image.pollinations.ai/image_gen_dmd2/` vendored DMD2/SDXL-turbo backend (~54K lines, dead since the 'turbo' model left the registry — only remaining 'turbo' is the `z-image-turbo` alias served by the z-image backend), plus its OVH launchers `turbo-startup.sh` / `pollinations-turbo.service` and the turbo lines in `install-services.sh`
- Removes stale build/ops artifacts: `profile.txt`, `tableLogs.txt`, `infinite_loop.sh`, `langdetect.py`, `edit_catgpt.sh`, `catgpt/catgpt_original.png`, `image_gen_cloudflare/` (only a package.json whose `main` points at a nonexistent file)
- Removes `webshare_100_proxies.txt` (~100 proxy host:port:user:password credentials). The credentials remain in git history — the webshare account should be rotated/cancelled if still active
- Removes orphaned `image.pollinations.ai/auth/` (googleCloudAuth.ts + GOOGLE_CLOUD_AUTH.md); zero importers — all live consumers use `gen.pollinations.ai/src/text/auth/googleCloudAuth.ts` (gen typecheck passes)
- Deployment caveat: image.pollinations.ai GPU services deploy outside CI (legacy OVH/RunPod hosts), so these deletions affect the repo only

Net: -56,173 lines. Repo-wide greps confirm zero remaining references to every deleted tree.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: 56K lines lighter
gist.blurb: We just did some massive spring cleaning in the image generation backend. Over 56,000 lines of legacy code and stale artifacts have been swept away.
gist.summary: Removed the deprecated DMD2/SDXL-turbo backend and various stale build artifacts from the image repository, deleting over 56,000 lines of dead code.
gist.impact: This keeps the codebase lean and maintainable for developers without affecting any active image generation endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: Nomnom creature eating a giant pile of old code printouts while Polly the bee sweeps up.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a massive pile of dusty old code printouts and floppy disks. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny cleaning bandana sweeps up nearby with a small broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
